requirement_topic.en: ESO Grid-Connection Review — IEC 62116, IEC 61727, and 230/400 V 50 Hz Settings (Bulgaria)
requirement_topic.zh: ESO并网审查——IEC 62116、IEC 61727及230/400 V 50 Hz参数（保加利亚）
requirement_topic.zht: ESO併網審查——IEC 62116、IEC 61727及230/400 V 50 Hz參數（保加利亞）

summary.en: Grid-connected solar PV inverters in Bulgaria should be treated as project-level grid-connection equipment subject to Electricity System Operator (ESO) technical review and Energy and Water Regulatory Commission (EWRC) energy-sector oversight. The practical IEC evidence package normally includes IEC 62116 anti-islanding and IEC 61727 utility-interface compliance, with firmware protection thresholds, reconnection delay, voltage windows, and frequency windows validated for Bulgaria's 230/400 V, 50 Hz low-voltage grid. Bulgaria uses the same 50 Hz frequency as China, but the nominal voltage differs: Bulgaria is 230 V single-phase and 400 V three-phase (EU standard), while China is 220/380 V under GB/T 156. Large-scale PV projects in Bulgaria are also subject to EU RfG Commission Regulation (EU) 2016/631 above applicable thresholds.
summary.zh: 保加利亚并网太阳能光伏逆变器应作为项目级并网设备处理，接受保加利亚电力系统运营商（ESO）技术审查及能源和水资源监管委员会（EWRC）能源监管。实际IEC证据包通常包括IEC 62116防孤岛和IEC 61727公用电网接口合规，并须针对保加利亚230/400 V、50 Hz低压电网验证固件保护阈值、重连延迟、电压窗口和频率窗口。保加利亚与中国同为50 Hz频率，但标称电压不同：保加利亚为单相230 V、三相400 V（欧盟标准），而中国依据GB/T 156为220/380 V。保加利亚大型光伏项目在适用阈值以上还须符合欧盟委员会法规（EU）2016/631。
summary.zht: 保加利亞併網太陽能光伏逆變器應作為項目級併網設備處理，接受保加利亞電力系統運營商（ESO）技術審查及能源和水資源監管委員會（EWRC）能源監管。實際IEC證據包通常包括IEC 62116防孤島和IEC 61727公用電網介面合規，並須針對保加利亞230/400 V、50 Hz低壓電網驗證韌體保護閾值、重連延遲、電壓窗口和頻率窗口。保加利亞與中國同為50 Hz頻率，但標稱電壓不同：保加利亞為單相230 V、三相400 V（歐盟標準），而中國依據GB/T 156為220/380 V。保加利亞大型光伏項目在適用閾值以上還須符合歐盟委員會法規（EU）2016/631。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62116 — Utility-interconnected photovoltaic inverters — Test procedure of islanding prevention measures
IEC 61727 — Photovoltaic systems — Characteristics of the utility interface
EN 50549-1:2019 / EN 50549-2:2019 (CENELEC harmonised grid-connection standards for generators)
ESO project grid-connection and commissioning requirements for the relevant installation
EWRC electricity-sector approval or oversight requirements where applicable
Bulgaria low-voltage grid context — 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase, 50 Hz

summary.en: Chinese PV inverter grid-connection evidence commonly includes GB/T 19964-2024 for PV power station connection, NB/T 32004 for grid-connected inverter technical specifications, GB/T 37408 for PV grid-connected inverter requirements, and domestic anti-islanding test results. These documents are built around China grid conditions and domestic acceptance procedures. China's low-voltage baseline is 220/380 V at 50 Hz, not Bulgaria's 230/400 V at 50 Hz. Chinese grid certificates and factory firmware settings do not automatically transfer to ESO acceptance or EWRC project review in Bulgaria.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器并网证据通常包括GB/T 19964-2024光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定、NB/T 32004光伏并网逆变器技术规范、GB/T 37408光伏并网逆变器技术要求及国内防孤岛测试结果。这些文件以中国电网条件和国内验收流程为基础。中国低压基准为50 Hz、220/380 V，而非保加利亚50 Hz、230/400 V。中国并网证书和出厂固件设置不能自动转移为ESO认可或EWRC项目审查证据。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器併網證據通常包括GB/T 19964-2024光伏發電站接入電力系統技術規定、NB/T 32004光伏併網逆變器技術規範、GB/T 37408光伏併網逆變器技術要求及國內防孤島測試結果。這些文件以中國電網條件和國內驗收流程為基礎。中國低壓基準為50 Hz、220/380 V，而非保加利亞50 Hz、230/400 V。中國併網證書和出廠韌體設置不能自動轉移為ESO認可或EWRC項目審查證據。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: China GB/T and NB/T grid-connection evidence is not a substitute for Bulgaria ESO project acceptance. Exporters should prepare IEC 62116 anti-islanding evidence, IEC 61727 utility-interface evidence, a Bulgaria-specific settings file, and commissioning records for 230/400 V at 50 Hz. Do not describe Bulgaria voltage as matching China: only the 50 Hz frequency matches, while nominal voltage differs from China's 220/380 V. For large-scale projects, Commission Regulation (EU) 2016/631 compliance under ESO-defined thresholds is required. Bulgarian-language documentation should be prepared for all regulatory submissions.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T和NB/T并网证据不能替代保加利亚ESO项目验收。出口商应准备IEC 62116防孤岛证据、IEC 61727公用电网接口证据、保加利亚专用设置文件以及230/400 V、50 Hz调试记录。不得称保加利亚电压与中国相同：仅50 Hz频率相同，标称电压不同于中国220/380 V。大型项目须按ESO规定阈值符合委员会法规（EU）2016/631。所有监管提交文件应准备保加利亚语版本。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T和NB/T併網證據不能替代保加利亞ESO項目驗收。出口商應準備IEC 62116防孤島證據、IEC 61727公用電網介面證據、保加利亞專用設置文件以及230/400 V、50 Hz調試記錄。不得稱保加利亞電壓與中國相同：僅50 Hz頻率相同，標稱電壓不同於中國220/380 V。大型項目須按ESO規定閾值符合委員會法規（EU）2016/631。所有監管提交文件應準備保加利亞語版本。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice for grid-connected projects through ESO technical review and EWRC approval or oversight; EU RfG 2016/631 is binding for power-generating modules above ESO-defined thresholds
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese grid-connection evidence satisfies China domestic grid acceptance only and is not an ESO Bulgaria approval substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T grid-connection documents do not automatically satisfy Bulgaria ESO grid-connection review. Prepare IEC 62116 and IEC 61727 evidence, re-parameterise inverter firmware for Bulgaria's 230/400 V at 50 Hz grid, and document earthing, surge protection, and commissioning records. Verify current ESO and EWRC project requirements directly before shipment or commissioning.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T并网文件不能自动满足保加利亚ESO并网审查。请准备IEC 62116和IEC 61727证据，将逆变器固件重新参数化为保加利亚230/400 V、50 Hz电网，并记录接地、浪涌保护和调试记录。出货或调试前请直接核实现行ESO和EWRC项目要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T併網文件不能自動滿足保加利亞ESO併網審查。請準備IEC 62116和IEC 61727證據，將逆變器韌體重新參數化為保加利亞230/400 V、50 Hz電網，並記錄接地、浪湧保護和調試記錄。出貨或調試前請直接核實現行ESO和EWRC項目要求。
